intended_use: BrainInsight is intended for automatic labeling, spatial measurement, and volumetric quantification of brain structures from a set of low-field MR images and returns annotated and segmented images, co
intended_use_full: BrainInsight is intended for automatic labeling, spatial measurement, and volumetric quantification of brain structures from a set of low-field MR images and returns annotated and segmented images, color overlays and reports.
target_condition: Brain structural assessment including stroke, hydrocephalus, hemorrhage, mass/edema, and tumor
ground_truth: For midline shift: average shift distance of all annotators. For segmentation: Simultaneous Truth and Performance Level Estimation (STAPLE).
other_metrics: Midline Shift: Model discrepancy T1=0.99 mm, T2=0.80 mm, T2-Fast=0.89 mm, FLAIR=0.75 mm. Lateral Ventricle Left Dice Coefficient: T1=85%, T2=84%, T2-Fast=86%, FLAIR=89%. Lateral Ventricle Right Dice Coefficient: T1=83%, T2=82%, T2-Fast=86%, FLAIR=88%. Whole Brain Dice Coefficient: T1=95%, T2=96%. Volume Differences reported for all applications.
